pages.text: Each PreFab has $(bold)6 independent faces$() that can be configured:$(br2)$(li)North, South, East, West$(li)Up, Down$(br2)Each face has its own mode, filter, and target.

pages.title: Face Modes
pages.text: $(bold)DISABLED$()$(br)Face inactive, no transport$(br2)$(bold)PULL$()$(br)Extract from Overworld → Transport to CM Importer$(br2)$(bold)PUSH$()$(br)Extract from CM Exporter → Transport to Overworld

pages.title: Resource Filters
pages.text: $(bold)ITEMS$() (Current)$(br)Transfer items only$(br2)$(bold)FLUIDS$() (Future)$(br)Transfer fluids only$(br2)$(bold)ENERGY$() (Future)$(br)Transfer energy only$(br2)$(bold)ALL$() (Future)$(br)Transfer all types

pages.title: Target Selection
pages.text: Each face must link to a specific gate:$(br2)$(bold)PULL faces$() → Link to Importers$(br2)$(bold)PUSH faces$() → Link to Exporters$(br2)Select from dropdown in GUI. Gates are identified by UUID or frequency name.

pages.title: Example Setup
pages.text: $(bold)NORTH:$() PULL ITEMS → Coal Importer$(br)$(bold)EAST:$() PULL ITEMS → Ore Importer$(br)$(bold)SOUTH:$() PUSH ITEMS → Ingot Exporter$(br)$(bold)WEST/UP/DOWN:$() DISABLED$(br2)Connect chests to NORTH, EAST, SOUTH faces.
